title: The Precious Treasury of the Fundamental Nature
author: Longchenpa
description: The first and only commentary on the Buddhist master Longchenpa's essential text on Dzogchen by modern scholar and Nyingma master, Khangsar Khenpo Tenpa'i Wangchuk.
